best_bet.reason: Slightly taller surf at around 2 feet paired with the calmest winds of the three counties creates the smoothest, most defined conditions for body surfers and anyone looking for a bit more action without the chop.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach

counties.name: Brunswick County
counties.beaches: Oak Island · Holden Beach · Ocean Isle Beach · Sunset Beach
